revisions.what_changed: Initial workshop: 27 Danilo source files (23 content tabs across 11 groups) merged into 9 canonical output files + dialogue summary + OpKit. Exceptionally rich source material with production-quality email copy.
revisions.quality_rationale: All content tab groups filled with graded evidence. Full email sequences with actual copy for 4 major flows. Danilo's aspirational statistics explicitly tagged as [VOID]. FTC compliance gaps flagged. Discount defense policy added. Maintenance time budgeted. 5 dialogue upgrades applied. Main limitations: all benchmarks are industry averages (IonWave data doesn't exist yet), some health claims need legal review.
